_comment: Upcoming legislative changes affecting veteran benefits. App filters by state and displays as alert cards.

entries.summary: Indiana extends full property tax exemption to 100% P&T disabled veterans.
entries.detail: Effective for the 2027 tax year, veterans with a 100% Permanent and Total VA disability rating are exempt from property tax on their primary residence. Previously, Indiana offered a partial exemption. The new law also replaces the old deduction system ($24,960/$14,000) with a credit system ($350/$250/$600) for veterans rated 10%-90%. Vehicle excise tax carryover is eliminated under the new credit structure.

veteran_action.description: File exemption application (State Form 51186) with your county auditor's office. Bring your VA disability rating letter. Applications accepted starting July 1, 2026.

data_impact.note: Will be promoted to public repo on or after effective date. IN partial exemption structure will also change from deductions to credits.
